PETITION TO TRANSFER TO SAN MATEO COUNTY
Off Calendar Sep-21-2009 Granted Per Written Order

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Of The Petition For Change Of Venue To San Mateo County
Off Calendar Aug-04-2009 Off Calendar

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #2, REPORT, FEES
Off Calendar Jul-06-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Stephen Leutza for and with Charles Demeres and Steven Ink, from Borel Private Bank (Co-Trustees).

The Parties did not object to having the matter moved to San Mateo County. Mr. Ink presented oral argument to support his position with regard to the request for fees. The Court ordered Counsel to file the Petition For Change Of Venue to San Mateo County. Status for filing of the Petition For Change of Venue was set for August 4, 2009. The issue regarding fees was taken under submission.

Judge: David L. Ballati. Reporter: Susan Lee, CSR#4280. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy F. Smith.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #2, REPORT, FEES
Off Calendar Jun-03-2009 Continued To Jul-01-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #2, REPORT, FEES
Off Calendar May-20-2009 Continued To Jun-03-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

FUTURE ACCOUNTING
Off Calendar Mar-16-2009 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: No appearance was made by any party, counsel or interested person.

A citation will be issued to Trustee Borel Private Bank, Trustee Charles DeMarais and the Attorney for failure to file the second account. The return date is April 27, 2009 at 9:00 a.m, in Dept. 204.

Judge: Raymond Arata. Reporter: Susan Lee, CSR#4280. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy R. Harris.

Upon further review, the Court found that the accounting had been filed. The citation will not be issued and this matter will be taken off calendar.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING , REPORT
Off Calendar Jul-03-2007 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Steve Leutza appearing for petitioners/trustees. Court wants a declaration from Jenny's conservator on the medical needs and continue education needs. Extraordinay fees are submitted. Matter will be submitted when Court receive the declaration.
Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin CSR#11722. Clerk: Ella Yip.

Off Calendar Jun-06-2007 Off Calendar

Petn. For Auth. To Sell & Purchase Real Prop.
Off Calendar Mar-20-2006 Written Order Received
MINI MINUTES: John Leutza appearing for trustees. Notice questioned. No further notice is required on this petition. Issue on the needs and benefit for Jenny addressed. Petition is approved. Court will check the transfer date before signing the order. Judge Pro Tem: Dorothy L. McMath. Reporter: Teanna L. Ward CSR#11918. Clerk: Ella Yip.
